materials: 1 skein of Mandala yarn of your choice
Crochet hook size G or 4.25 mm

rounds.title: Ch 17
rounds.summary: Create a starting chain of 17 stitches.

rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: Sc in 2nd ch from hook and in next 2 chs. Hdc in next ch, dc in next 8 chains. Hdc in next ch. Sc in last 3 chains. Turn
rounds.summary: Work a mix of single, half double, and double crochets across the chain.

rounds.title: Rows 2-109
rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 1, sc in first 3 sts. Hdc in next st. dc in next 8 sts. Hdc in next st. sc in last 3 sts.
rounds.summary: Repeat the established stitch pattern across for 108 rows.

rounds.title: Finish off and sew the 2 ends together.
rounds.rawInstruction: Finish off and sew the 2 ends together.
rounds.summary: Fasten off yarn and seam the ends together to form a loop.
